data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for policy controls on recognition and disclosure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the policy controls for what can be recognized versus disclosed. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for such policy controls, but without direct evidence, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of policy controls for what can be recognized vs disclosed.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
